name: CuBe
short_description: CuBe is a physics based runner game. Control a cube in an aesthetically pleasing world that's challenging and thrilling by avoiding the tricky blocks to make it to the end.
detailed_description:
CuBe is a physics based runner game created by one man. Control a cube in an aesthetically pleasing world that's challenging and thrilling by avoiding the tricky blocks to make it to the end. You can use your skills or memorize the blocks in the level to make it to the end successfully.

Features


  • Explore Beautiful Yet Challenging Levels.
  • With Endless Game Mode Compete Against Yourself And Other Players Through Global Platform Leaderboards, Or Relax And Play For Fun.
  • Play With More Than 20 Different Looking Cubes.
  • Use Your Reflex Or Memory To Avoid From The Blocks By Sliding, Jumping And Shrinking.
  • Push The Limits Of The Pacing And Experience The Most Challenging Feeling.
